details.zhHans: 按现行 Citi Nights 条款，美东时间周五和周六晚 6 点至次日早 6 点的合资格餐厅消费。

category.zhHans: Citi Nights 以外的餐厅消费

details.zhHans: 其他合资格消费的基础积攒倍率。

title.en: Up to $300 hotel credit each half-year
title.zhHans: 每半年最高 $300 酒店报销

summary.en: Up to $600 per calendar year for eligible prepaid Fine Hotels + Resorts or The Hotel Collection bookings through American Express Travel.
summary.zhHans: 每个自然年最高 $600，适用于通过 American Express Travel 预付的合资格 FHR 或 The Hotel Collection 订单。

details.en: The benefit is split into January-June and July-December periods, with up to $300 available in each period. The Hotel Collection generally requires a minimum two-night stay.
details.zhHans: 权益分为 1-6 月和 7-12 月两个周期，每周期最高 $300。The Hotel Collection 通常要求至少入住两晚。

title.zhHans: 每月 $15 Uber Cash

summary.en: Receive $15 in Uber Cash each month, plus an additional $20 in December, for eligible U.S. rides and orders.
summary.zhHans: 每月获得 $15 Uber Cash，12 月额外获得 $20，适用于美国境内合资格行程和订单。

details.en: Add the eligible Platinum Card to the Uber account and use an American Express card for the transaction. Unused monthly Uber Cash does not roll over.
details.zhHans: 需要把合资格白金卡添加到 Uber 账户，并在交易时选择美国运通卡。未使用的月度额度不会结转。

title.zhHans: 最高 $200 航空杂费报销

summary.en: Statement credits for eligible incidental fees charged by one selected qualifying airline.
summary.zhHans: 选择一家合资格航空公司后，可报销符合条件的航空杂费。

details.en: Select a qualifying airline before using the benefit. Eligible incidental charges can include items such as checked-bag fees and in-flight refreshments; airfare is generally excluded.
details.zhHans: 使用前需选择一家合资格航空公司。符合条件的费用可包括托运行李和机上餐饮等杂费，机票通常不在报销范围内。

title.zhHans: Global Lounge Collection 贵宾室权益

summary.en: Access to participating Centurion, Priority Pass Select, Delta Sky Club, and other partner lounges under current terms.
summary.zhHans: 按现行条款使用 Centurion、Priority Pass Select、Delta Sky Club 及其他合作贵宾室。

details.en: Enrollment may be required for some programs. Visit limits, same-day travel requirements, guests, and participating locations vary by lounge network.
details.zhHans: 部分项目需要注册。访问次数、当日乘机要求、同行客人和参与地点会因贵宾室网络而异。

title.zhHans: 每月 $10 Uber Cash

summary.en: Up to $120 per year in Uber Cash for eligible U.S. rides and Uber Eats orders.
summary.zhHans: 每年最高 $120 Uber Cash，适用于美国境内合资格行程和 Uber Eats 订单。

details.en: Add the Gold Card to the Uber account. Monthly amounts expire at the end of each month and an American Express card must be selected for the transaction.
details.zhHans: 需要把金卡添加到 Uber 账户。月度额度在当月底失效，交易时需选择美国运通卡。

title.zhHans: 每月最高 $10 餐饮报销

summary.en: Up to $120 per year in statement credits at participating dining partners after enrollment.
summary.zhHans: 注册后，在参与活动的餐饮合作商户消费，每年最高获得 $120 账单报销。

details.en: Enrollment is required. Eligible partners and purchase channels are defined by American Express and can change.
details.zhHans: 必须先注册。合资格合作商户和购买渠道由美国运通规定，并可能发生变化。

title.zhHans: 每月最高 $7 Dunkin' 报销

summary.en: Up to $84 per year in statement credits for eligible U.S. Dunkin' purchases after enrollment.
summary.zhHans: 注册后，在美国 Dunkin' 进行合资格消费，每年最高获得 $84 账单报销。

details.en: Enrollment is required. Purchases must be made with the eligible Gold Card at qualifying U.S. locations or channels.
details.zhHans: 必须先注册，并使用合资格金卡在美国参与活动的门店或渠道消费。

title.zhHans: $100 The Hotel Collection 入住消费额度

summary.en: A property credit toward eligible charges on qualifying Hotel Collection stays booked through American Express Travel.
summary.zhHans: 通过 American Express Travel 预订合资格 The Hotel Collection 住宿，可获得用于酒店内合资格消费的额度。

details.en: A minimum two-night stay is required. Eligible charges vary by property, and the credit is attached to each qualifying booking rather than a monthly or annual allowance.
details.zhHans: 至少入住两晚。可抵扣的消费因酒店而异，此额度按每笔合资格订单提供，而不是月度或年度固定额度。

title.zhHans: 每年 $300 旅行报销

summary.en: Automatic statement credits for a broad range of eligible travel purchases each account anniversary year.
summary.zhHans: 每个持卡周年年度内，广泛的合资格旅行消费可自动获得账单报销。

details.en: Chase applies the credit to purchases that code as travel, up to the annual limit. Purchases covered by the credit generally do not earn points.
details.zhHans: Chase 会对编码为旅行类别的消费自动使用额度，直至达到年度上限。被报销的消费通常不赚取积分。

title.en: Up to $500 annual The Edit hotel credit
title.zhHans: 每年最高 $500 The Edit 酒店报销

summary.en: Statement credits for eligible prepaid stays booked through The Edit by Chase Travel.
summary.zhHans: 通过 The Edit by Chase Travel 预付合资格住宿，可获得账单报销。

details.en: The current terms require a minimum two-night stay and limit each qualifying transaction to up to $250 in credit. Check Chase for property and booking restrictions.
details.zhHans: 现行条款要求至少入住两晚，每笔合资格交易最多报销 $250。酒店范围和预订限制请以 Chase 最新条款为准。

title.zhHans: 每半年最高 $150 餐饮报销

summary.en: Up to $300 per year at restaurants participating in Sapphire Reserve Exclusive Tables.
summary.zhHans: 在 Sapphire Reserve Exclusive Tables 参与餐厅消费，每年最高报销 $300。

details.en: The benefit is split into two six-month periods and applies only to participating restaurants and eligible purchase channels.
details.zhHans: 权益分为两个半年周期，仅适用于参与活动的餐厅和合资格购买渠道。

title.en: Chase Sapphire Lounge and Priority Pass access
title.zhHans: Chase Sapphire Lounge 与 Priority Pass 贵宾室

summary.en: Access participating Chase Sapphire Lounges and Priority Pass locations under current membership terms.
summary.zhHans: 按现行会员条款使用参与活动的 Chase Sapphire Lounge 和 Priority Pass 贵宾室。

details.en: Priority Pass Select is automatically activated for eligible primary cardmembers and authorized users. Guest rules, participating locations, and same-day travel requirements can change.
details.zhHans: 合资格主卡持有人和附属卡用户的 Priority Pass Select 会自动激活。同行客人政策、参与地点和当日乘机要求可能变化。

title.zhHans: 旅行与购物保障

summary.en: A package of trip cancellation, interruption, delay, luggage, rental-car, and purchase protections under the benefit guide.
summary.zhHans: 权益指南包含旅行取消、中断、延误、行李、租车和购物等多类保障。

details.en: Coverage limits, eligible travelers, required payment methods, exclusions, and claim deadlines vary. Review the current Guide to Benefits before relying on coverage.
details.zhHans: 保障额度、合资格旅行者、付款要求、除外责任和理赔期限各不相同。依赖保障前请查看最新 Guide to Benefits。

title.en: Up to $100 annual Chase Travel hotel credit
title.zhHans: 每年最高 $100 Chase Travel 酒店报销

summary.en: Statement credits for eligible hotel stays purchased through Chase Travel each account anniversary year.
summary.zhHans: 每个持卡周年年度，通过 Chase Travel 购买合资格酒店住宿可获得账单报销。

details.en: The credit is automatically applied to qualifying Chase Travel hotel purchases, up to the annual limit. Credited purchases generally do not earn points.
details.zhHans: 额度会自动用于合资格 Chase Travel 酒店消费，直至年度上限。被报销的消费通常不赚取积分。

title.zhHans: 最高 $120 快速通关申请费报销

summary.en: A statement credit for an eligible Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS application charged to the card.
summary.zhHans: 使用该卡支付合资格 Global Entry、TSA PreCheck 或 NEXUS 申请费，可获得账单报销。

details.en: The credit is available once every four years under current terms. Only one eligible application fee is reimbursed per benefit period.
details.zhHans: 按现行条款，每四年可使用一次；每个权益周期仅报销一笔合资格申请费。

title.zhHans: 旅行与购物保障

summary.en: Built-in coverage can include trip cancellation, interruption, rental-car damage, baggage, purchase protection, and extended warranty.
summary.zhHans: 内置保障可包括旅行取消、中断、租车损失、行李、购物保障和延长保修。

details.en: Each coverage has separate eligibility rules, limits, exclusions, required payment methods, and claim deadlines. Review the current benefit guide.
details.zhHans: 每项保障都有独立的资格、额度、除外责任、付款方式和理赔期限，请查看最新权益指南。

title.zhHans: 每年 $300 Capital One Travel 额度

summary.en: An annual credit for eligible bookings made through Capital One Travel.
summary.zhHans: 通过 Capital One Travel 进行合资格预订时可使用年度旅行额度。

details.en: The credit is available to eligible primary account holders and expires at the next account-open anniversary if unused. See Capital One Travel terms for eligible bookings.
details.zhHans: 额度面向合资格主卡持有人，未使用部分会在下一个开户周年到期。合资格预订范围请查看 Capital One Travel 条款。

title.zhHans: Capital One Lounge 贵宾室权益

summary.en: Eligible cardholders can access participating Capital One Lounge locations under current access rules.
summary.zhHans: 合资格持卡人可按现行规则使用参与活动的 Capital One Lounge。

details.en: Present the eligible physical card or a digital lounge pass in the Capital One app. Guest rules, same-day travel requirements, and participating locations can change.
details.zhHans: 入场时需出示合资格实体卡或 Capital One App 中的电子贵宾室通行证。同行客人、当日乘机要求和参与地点可能变化。

title.zhHans: Priority Pass 贵宾室权益

summary.en: Eligible primary cardholders can use participating Priority Pass lounges after activating their complimentary membership.
summary.zhHans: 合资格主卡持有人激活免费会员后，可使用参与活动的 Priority Pass 贵宾室。

details.en: Activation is required through the Capital One app. Participating lounges, guest fees, access rules, and membership eligibility can change.
details.zhHans: 需要通过 Capital One App 激活。参与贵宾室、同行客人费用、入场规则和会员资格可能变化。

title.en: Up to $120 Global Entry or TSA PreCheck credit
title.zhHans: 最高 $120 Global Entry 或 TSA PreCheck 报销

summary.en: A statement credit for one eligible Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee charged to the card.
summary.zhHans: 使用该卡支付一笔合资格 Global Entry 或 TSA PreCheck 申请费，可获得账单报销。

details.en: The application credit is available once every four years under current terms. The charged application must be eligible and within the maximum amount.
details.zhHans: 按现行条款，每四年可使用一次。申请项目必须符合资格，且报销不超过最高额度。

title.en: Visa Infinite travel and purchase protections
title.zhHans: Visa Infinite 旅行与购物保障

summary.en: The card's current benefit guide includes eligible travel, rental-car, phone, and purchase protections.
summary.zhHans: 现行权益指南包含合资格旅行、租车、手机和购物等保障。

details.en: Benefits can vary by card network and account. Coverage limits, exclusions, required payment, and claim deadlines are controlled by the current Guide to Benefits.
details.zhHans: 权益可能因卡组织和账户而异，保障额度、除外责任、付款要求和理赔期限以最新 Guide to Benefits 为准。

title.zhHans: United Club 会员资格

summary.en: The primary cardmember receives a United Club membership while the account remains eligible.
summary.zhHans: 账户保持合资格状态期间，主卡持有人可获得 United Club 会员资格。

details.en: Access rules, eligible locations, guests, and same-day travel requirements are governed by the current United Club terms.
details.zhHans: 适用地点、同行客人及当日乘机要求以最新 United Club 条款为准。

title.en: First and second checked bags free
title.zhHans: 第一及第二件托运行李免费

summary.en: The primary cardmember and one companion on the same eligible United reservation can receive two free checked bags each.
summary.zhHans: 主卡持有人及同一合资格 United 预订中的一名同行者，每人可免费托运两件行李。

details.en: The MileagePlus number must be attached to the reservation and the ticket must meet the current card-payment requirements.
details.zhHans: 预订需关联 MileagePlus 号码，且机票付款方式需符合现行卡片条款。

title.zhHans: 最高 $120 快速通关申请费报销

summary.en: A statement credit for an eligible Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS application charged to the card.
summary.zhHans: 使用该卡支付合资格 Global Entry、TSA PreCheck 或 NEXUS 申请费，可获得账单报销。

details.en: The credit is available once every four years under current terms.
details.zhHans: 按现行条款，该额度每四年可使用一次。

title.zhHans: 两次 10,000 里程奖励机票折扣

summary.en: Cardmembers can earn up to two 10,000-mile United award discounts after reaching the published annual purchase thresholds.
summary.zhHans: 达到公布的年度消费门槛后，持卡人最多可获得两次 United 奖励机票 10,000 里程折扣。

details.en: Each discount currently requires a separate $20,000 purchase increment in a calendar year; redemption restrictions apply.
details.zhHans: 按现行条款，每次折扣需在一个自然年内完成一个独立的 $20,000 消费增量，并受兑换限制。

title.zhHans: 购物保障

summary.en: Eligible new purchases can be covered against damage or theft for the period and limits in the current benefit guide.
summary.zhHans: 合资格新购商品可按现行权益指南规定的期限和额度获得损坏或失窃保障。

details.en: Coverage limits, exclusions, required payment, documentation, and claim deadlines apply.
details.zhHans: 适用保障额度、除外责任、付款要求、证明文件及理赔期限。

title.zhHans: 旅行取消与中断保障

summary.en: Eligible prepaid, nonrefundable passenger fares can receive trip cancellation or interruption coverage.
summary.zhHans: 合资格预付且不可退款的客运票价可获得旅行取消或中断保障。

details.en: Covered reasons, travelers, payment requirements, exclusions, limits, and claim deadlines are defined by the current benefit guide.
details.zhHans: 承保原因、旅行者、付款要求、除外责任、额度和理赔期限以最新权益指南为准。

title.zhHans: 每年 Category 1-4 免费住宿奖励

summary.en: One free-night award valid at participating Category 1-4 Hyatt hotels is issued after each cardmember anniversary.
summary.zhHans: 每个持卡周年后，可获得一晚适用于参与活动的 Hyatt Category 1-4 酒店的免费住宿奖励。

details.en: The award has an expiration date and is subject to availability and World of Hyatt redemption terms.
details.zhHans: 奖励设有有效期，并受房态和 World of Hyatt 兑换条款限制。

title.zhHans: 消费 $15,000 后额外 Category 1-4 免费住宿

summary.en: An additional Category 1-4 free-night award can be earned after $15,000 in eligible calendar-year purchases.
summary.zhHans: 每自然年完成 $15,000 合资格消费后，可额外获得一晚 Category 1-4 免费住宿奖励。

details.en: Purchase eligibility, timing, expiration, and hotel availability follow the current card and World of Hyatt terms.
details.zhHans: 消费资格、发放时间、有效期和酒店房态以最新卡片及 World of Hyatt 条款为准。

title.zhHans: 每年 5 晚会籍资格房晚

summary.en: Five tier-qualifying night credits are provided each calendar year toward World of Hyatt status.
summary.zhHans: 每个自然年提供 5 晚会籍资格房晚，用于 World of Hyatt 会籍进度。

details.en: Posting timing and status qualification remain subject to World of Hyatt program terms.
details.zhHans: 入账时间和会籍资格仍受 World of Hyatt 计划条款约束。

title.zhHans: 每年 40,000 积分周年住宿奖励

summary.en: One anniversary night valid at participating IHG hotels priced at 40,000 points or less is issued each account anniversary.
summary.zhHans: 每个账户周年可获得一晚适用于参与 IHG 酒店且价格不超过 40,000 积分的周年住宿奖励。

details.en: The certificate expires and is subject to availability; current terms may allow points to be added for higher-priced nights.
details.zhHans: 奖励设有有效期并受房态限制；现行条款可能允许补充积分兑换更高价格的住宿。

title.en: IHG One Rewards Platinum Elite status
title.zhHans: IHG One Rewards Platinum Elite 会籍

summary.en: The primary cardmember receives IHG One Rewards Platinum Elite status while the account remains eligible.
summary.zhHans: 账户保持合资格状态期间，主卡持有人可获得 IHG One Rewards Platinum Elite 会籍。

details.en: Status benefits, participating properties, and qualification timing follow current IHG One Rewards terms.
details.zhHans: 会籍权益、参与酒店和资格生效时间以最新 IHG One Rewards 条款为准。

title.zhHans: 奖励住宿第四晚免费

summary.en: When points are redeemed for four or more consecutive nights, every fourth night in the eligible stay costs zero points.
summary.zhHans: 使用积分连续兑换四晚或以上的合资格住宿时，每第四晚所需积分为零。

details.en: The benefit applies to qualifying standard reward-night stays and is controlled by current IHG redemption terms.
details.zhHans: 该权益适用于符合条件的标准奖励住宿，并以最新 IHG 兑换条款为准。

title.en: Cash back rewards do not expire
title.zhHans: 返现奖励不会过期

summary.en: Earned cash back rewards do not expire while Discover maintains the rewards balance under current terms.
summary.zhHans: 按现行条款，只要 Discover 保留奖励余额，已获得的返现奖励不会过期。

details.en: Redemption options and treatment after account closure remain subject to Discover's current rewards terms.
details.zhHans: 兑换方式以及账户关闭后的处理仍以 Discover 最新奖励条款为准。

title.en: No Bilt transaction fee on eligible housing payments
title.zhHans: 合资格住房付款免 Bilt 交易费

summary.en: Eligible rent and other supported housing payments can be made through Bilt without Bilt charging a card transaction fee.
summary.zhHans: 通过 Bilt 支付合资格房租及其他支持的住房款项时，Bilt 不收取信用卡交易费。

details.en: Supported payment types, landlord acceptance, limits, and account qualification follow current Bilt terms.
details.zhHans: 支持的付款类型、房东接受方式、限额和账户资格以最新 Bilt 条款为准。

title.zhHans: 每半年 $50 Bilt Travel 酒店额度

summary.en: Up to $100 per year, split into two $50 periods, for eligible hotel bookings through Bilt Travel.
summary.zhHans: 每年最高 $100，分为两个 $50 周期，用于通过 Bilt Travel 完成的合资格酒店预订。

details.en: Unused credit does not carry between benefit periods; booking and minimum-stay requirements may apply.
details.zhHans: 未使用额度不会跨周期结转，并可能适用预订及最低入住要求。

title.zhHans: 每年 $200 Bilt Cash

summary.en: The card provides $200 in annual Bilt Cash under current terms.
summary.zhHans: 按现行条款，该卡每年提供 $200 Bilt Cash。

details.en: Eligible uses, issuance timing, expiration, and exclusions follow current Bilt Cash terms.
details.zhHans: 合资格用途、发放时间、有效期和除外规则以最新 Bilt Cash 条款为准。

title.zhHans: 每半年 $200 Bilt Travel 酒店额度

summary.en: Up to $400 per year, split into two $200 periods, for eligible hotel bookings through Bilt Travel.
summary.zhHans: 每年最高 $400，分为两个 $200 周期，用于通过 Bilt Travel 完成的合资格酒店预订。

details.en: Unused credit does not carry between benefit periods; booking and minimum-stay requirements may apply.
details.zhHans: 未使用额度不会跨周期结转，并可能适用预订及最低入住要求。

title.zhHans: Priority Pass 贵宾室会员

summary.en: Eligible cardmembers can enroll in the included Priority Pass membership for participating airport lounges.
summary.zhHans: 合资格持卡人可注册随卡提供的 Priority Pass 会员，以使用参与活动的机场贵宾室。

details.en: Enrollment is required; participating locations, guest access, visit limits, and fees follow current terms.
details.zhHans: 需要注册；参与地点、同行客人、使用次数和费用以最新条款为准。

title.zhHans: 每月最高 $25 餐饮报销

summary.en: Up to $300 per calendar year in statement credits, provided as up to $25 monthly, for eligible restaurant purchases worldwide.
summary.zhHans: 全球合资格餐厅消费每月最高可报销 $25，每自然年最高 $300。

details.en: Only eligible restaurant charges in each monthly period qualify; unused credit does not carry forward.
details.zhHans: 仅各月周期内的合资格餐厅消费可获报销，未使用额度不会结转。

title.en: Annual free-night award up to 85,000 points
title.zhHans: 每年最高 85,000 积分免费住宿奖励

summary.en: One free-night award worth up to 85,000 Marriott Bonvoy points is issued after each card renewal month.
summary.zhHans: 每次续卡月份后，可获得一晚最高价值 85,000 Marriott Bonvoy 积分的免费住宿奖励。

details.en: The award expires and is subject to availability; current terms may allow points to be added for a higher redemption price.
details.zhHans: 奖励设有有效期并受房态限制；现行条款可能允许补充积分兑换更高价格的住宿。

title.zhHans: Marriott Bonvoy Platinum Elite 会籍

summary.en: The primary cardmember receives Marriott Bonvoy Platinum Elite status while the account remains eligible.
summary.zhHans: 账户保持合资格状态期间，主卡持有人可获得 Marriott Bonvoy Platinum Elite 会籍。

details.en: Status benefits, participating properties, and account-linking requirements follow current Marriott Bonvoy and card terms.
details.zhHans: 会籍权益、参与酒店和账户关联要求以最新 Marriott Bonvoy 及卡片条款为准。

title.en: Free checked bag and preferred boarding
title.zhHans: 免费托运行李与优先登机

summary.en: The primary cardholder and eligible companions on the same reservation can receive a free checked bag and preferred boarding.
summary.zhHans: 主卡持有人及同一预订中的合资格同行者可获得免费托运行李和优先登机。

details.en: The Atmos Rewards number must be attached and the ticket must meet current card-payment and itinerary requirements; companion limits apply.
details.zhHans: 预订需关联 Atmos Rewards 号码，且机票付款方式与行程需符合现行要求；同行人数受限。

title.zhHans: 年度消费 $6,000 后获得 $99 同行票

summary.en: A $99 base-fare Companion Fare can be earned after meeting the current annual purchase requirement.
summary.zhHans: 达到现行年度消费要求后，可获得一张基础票价 $99 的同行票。

details.en: Taxes and fees apply. Qualification, eligible routes, booking class, expiration, and purchase requirements follow current terms.
details.zhHans: 需另付税费；资格、适用航线、舱位、有效期和消费要求以最新条款为准。

title.zhHans: $100 Alaska Lounge+ 贵宾室会员折扣

summary.en: Eligible cardholders can receive a $100 discount on an annual Alaska Lounge+ membership.
summary.zhHans: 合资格持卡人购买年度 Alaska Lounge+ 贵宾室会员时可享 $100 折扣。

details.en: The membership purchase and account must meet current Alaska Lounge and card eligibility terms.
details.zhHans: 会员购买和账户需符合最新 Alaska Lounge 及卡片资格条款。

title.zhHans: 每年 25,000 积分全球同行奖励

summary.en: An annual Global Companion Award can cover up to 25,000 points of an eligible companion award itinerary.
summary.zhHans: 年度全球同行奖励可抵扣合资格同行奖励行程最多 25,000 积分。

details.en: Issuance, eligible itineraries, taxes, expiration, and any purchase requirements follow current Atmos Rewards terms.
details.zhHans: 发放、适用行程、税费、有效期及任何消费要求以最新 Atmos Rewards 条款为准。

title.en: Two Alaska Lounge passes each quarter
title.zhHans: 每季度两张 Alaska Lounge 通行证

summary.en: Two Alaska Lounge passes are provided each quarter, for up to eight passes per year under current terms.
summary.zhHans: 按现行条款，每季度提供两张 Alaska Lounge 通行证，每年最多八张。

details.en: Pass issuance, expiration, participating lounges, same-day travel, and guest rules apply.
details.zhHans: 通行证发放、有效期、参与贵宾室、当日乘机和同行客人规则均适用。

title.zhHans: 最高 $120 快速通关申请费报销

summary.en: A statement credit for an eligible Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS application charged to the card.
summary.zhHans: 使用该卡支付合资格 Global Entry、TSA PreCheck 或 NEXUS 申请费，可获得账单报销。

details.en: The credit is available once every four years under current terms.
details.zhHans: 按现行条款，该额度每四年可使用一次。

title.zhHans: 航班延误即时额度

summary.en: Eligible Alaska Airlines flight delays can trigger a $50 credit for qualifying same-day expenses under current terms.
summary.zhHans: 按现行条款，合资格 Alaska Airlines 航班延误可触发 $50 额度，用于符合条件的当日支出。

details.en: Eligible delays, ticket payment, itinerary, notice, expense types, timing, and redemption restrictions apply.
details.zhHans: 适用延误、机票付款、行程、通知、支出类型、时间及兑换限制。

title.zhHans: 每年 $100 酒店优惠

summary.en: $100 off one eligible hotel stay of $500 or more, excluding taxes and fees, booked through Citi Travel each calendar year.
summary.zhHans: 每自然年通过 Citi Travel 预订一次税费前满 $500 的合资格酒店住宿，可减免 $100。

details.en: The benefit applies instantly at booking to one qualifying stay made through cititravel.com or the published phone channel; current booking and exclusion terms apply.
details.zhHans: 通过 cititravel.com 或公布的电话渠道预订一次符合条件的住宿时即时抵扣；适用现行预订要求和除外条款。

title.en: The Reserve by Citi Travel hotel benefits
title.zhHans: The Reserve by Citi Travel 酒店礼遇

summary.en: Eligible Reserve hotel rates include daily breakfast for two, Wi-Fi, and a property-specific $100 experience credit.
summary.zhHans: 预订合资格 The Reserve 酒店价格，可享双人每日早餐、Wi-Fi 及酒店指定的 $100 体验额度。

details.en: Early check-in, late checkout, and room upgrades may also be available subject to availability; a Reserve Hotel rate must be selected at checkout.
details.zhHans: 视供应情况还可能提供提前入住、延迟退房和房型升级；结账时必须选择 Reserve Hotel 价格。

title.zhHans: 旅行保障组合

summary.en: Eligible trips can receive trip cancellation and interruption, trip delay, lost or damaged luggage, and car-rental coverage.
summary.zhHans: 合资格行程可获得旅行取消与中断、行程延误、行李遗失或损坏以及租车保障。

details.en: Coverage depends on payment, covered events, limits, exclusions, documentation, and claim deadlines in the current benefit guide.
details.zhHans: 保障取决于最新权益指南中的付款要求、承保事件、额度、除外责任、证明文件和理赔期限。

title.zhHans: 每年最高 $300 酒店优惠

summary.en: Up to $300 off one eligible hotel stay of two nights or more booked through Citi Travel each calendar year.
summary.zhHans: 每自然年通过 Citi Travel 预订一次至少两晚的合资格酒店住宿，可减免最高 $300。

details.en: The benefit applies to one qualifying prepaid hotel booking under current Citi Travel terms; taxes, fees, booking channels, and exclusions apply.
details.zhHans: 该权益适用于符合现行 Citi Travel 条款的一次合资格预付酒店预订；税费、预订渠道和除外规则均适用。

title.zhHans: 每年最高 $200 Splurge 报销

summary.en: Up to $200 in annual statement credits for eligible purchases with up to two selected participating brands.
summary.zhHans: 在最多两个自选参与品牌完成合资格消费，每年可获得最高 $200 账单报销。

details.en: Brand selection, eligible purchases, exclusions, merchant processing, and changes to participating brands follow current Citi terms.
details.zhHans: 品牌选择、合资格消费、除外规则、商户入账方式及参与品牌变更以 Citi 最新条款为准。

title.zhHans: 每半年 $100 Blacklane 报销

summary.en: Up to $200 per calendar year for eligible Blacklane purchases, split into two $100 half-year periods.
summary.zhHans: 每自然年合资格 Blacklane 消费最高可报销 $200，分为两个每半年 $100 的周期。

details.en: The current periods are January through June and July through December; unused credit does not carry between periods.
details.zhHans: 现行周期为 1 月至 6 月及 7 月至 12 月；未使用额度不会跨周期结转。

title.zhHans: Priority Pass Select 会员

summary.en: Eligible cardmembers can enroll in the included Priority Pass Select membership for participating airport lounges.
summary.zhHans: 合资格持卡人可注册随卡提供的 Priority Pass Select 会员，以使用参与活动的机场贵宾室。

details.en: Enrollment is required; participating locations, guest access, visit rules, and fees follow current program terms.
details.zhHans: 需要注册；参与地点、同行客人、使用规则和费用以最新计划条款为准。

title.zhHans: 每年四张 Admirals Club 通行证

summary.en: Four Admirals Club Citi Strata Elite passes are provided each calendar year under current terms.
summary.zhHans: 按现行条款，每自然年提供四张 Admirals Club Citi Strata Elite 通行证。

details.en: Pass issuance, expiration, participating lounges, same-day travel, access, and guest rules apply.
details.zhHans: 通行证发放、有效期、参与贵宾室、当日乘机、使用资格和同行客人规则均适用。

title.zhHans: 最高 $120 快速通关申请费报销

summary.en: A statement credit for an eligible Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application charged to the card.
summary.zhHans: 使用该卡支付合资格 Global Entry 或 TSA PreCheck 申请费，可获得账单报销。

details.en: The credit is available once every four years under current terms; eligible programs and application channels may change.
details.zhHans: 按现行条款，该额度每四年可使用一次；合资格计划及申请渠道可能调整。

title.zhHans: 旅行与购物保障组合

summary.en: Eligible purchases and trips can receive the travel and shopping protections described in the current benefit guide.
summary.zhHans: 合资格消费和行程可获得最新权益指南所列的旅行及购物保障。

details.en: Coverage depends on payment, covered events, limits, exclusions, documentation, and claim deadlines in the current benefit guide.
details.zhHans: 保障取决于最新权益指南中的付款要求、承保事件、额度、除外责任、证明文件和理赔期限。
